note: Minimum sprite sizes: battle sprites ≥ 96px, portraits ≥ 144px, tiles = 64px, icons ≥ 40px. Below these sizes flux detail is lost on downscale.

sprites._note: Add sprites here after art agent defines visual style and dimensions
sprites.name: example
sprites.prompt: pixel art game sprite, pure black background (#000000), detailed shading with rim light, crisp readable silhouette centered in frame, no text, no watermark, no border frame, retro, crisp limited palette
